name: Maru
arohana: GM’DN; SRGM’DNS

chalan: Core M’aru eleMent discussed on source page: GM’DN, SNDM’GR. Page fraMes M’aru essentially as YaMan without Pa.
notation_note: Added from Raga Junglism. Ma converted to project convention (M=shuddha, M’=tivra). Source page emphasizes the characteristic Maru element GMDN / SNDMGR more than a single canonical aroh-avaroh pair.

name: Palas
arohana: nSgMPnS
avarohana: SnPMgRS
chalan: Single-ni forM used here. Alternate double-Ni forM on source page: nSgMPNS / SNPMgRnS.
notation_note: Added from Raga Junglism. Ma converted to project convention (M=shuddha, M’=tivra). Source page documents both a single-Ni and a double-Ni form; this entry uses the single-Ni version.
